F_100: 0,1,32,27,30,71,58,26,29,28,24,86,23,79,22,21,54,25,95,17,45,13,76,77,56,78,80,81,83,87,84,90,92,94,96,20,10,68,97,9,18,98,99,3,2,36,37,42,64,48,41,35,38,43,82,46,50,49,16,47,60,69,19,66,55,65,63,15,74,61,62,67,44,100,12,0|40,73,14,57,53,33,59,75,88,52,5,89,91,70,6,93,85,7,51,-1,72,34,8,4,39,11,31|5,6,8,12,14,16,20,24,26,29,33,36,38,44,45,54,61,63,73,-1,9,11,14,20,26,34,44|6,7,12,13,15,17,21,25,29,31,36,37,41,45,48,56,62,66,75,-1,11,13,16,22,28,37,46
R_50: 0,28,3,40,4,24,9,12,8,36,34,44,6,49,16,23,31,30,27,47,42,43,29,32,10,14,39,21,25,50,17,35,18,38,11,1,48,5,15,0|7,20,13,46,2,19,22,45,41,-1,26,33,37|1,4,5,6,8,10,11,22,33,-1,5,6,11|3,5,6,8,9,11,15,25,35,-1,6,7,13
R_100: 0,77,1,2,3,7,6,13,94,79,96,86,17,80,8,19,10,83,69,70,67,54,58,36,73,74,88,78,99,100,18,20,21,9,95,64,25,38,76,37,56,12,28,61,59,57,4,43,72,49,44,45,63,29,66,97,50,84,90,52,68,35,26,91,33,34,27,65,5,53,46,87,16,14,40,82,30,31,47,92,75,93,0|51,22,23,24,89,48,32,39,62,41,98,81,11,71,-1,85,42,60,55,15|2,4,5,8,19,24,29,31,38,40,46,57,58,75,-1,2,9,24,25,30|4,5,7,10,21,26,31,34,40,41,47,58,59,83,-1,5,10,25,26,34
